description: Registry of cluster-lens capture profiles used to collect Kubernetes topology and LocalAI placement evidence.
governanceRules: cluster-lens is installed by the infrastructure provider; this registry only defines capture and artifact conventions.
Captured cluster-lens snapshots must be stored together with Kubernetes pods, deployments and nodes snapshots to preserve schedulerName, labels, annotations and node placement evidence.
Profile references and artifact paths must remain repository-relative unless a runtime command explicitly overrides the output root.
The collector must not mutate cluster resources. It is a read-only placement evidence capture utility.
